description_long: This is a large, freestanding wooden cabinet with a dark brown finish and a modern, minimalist design. The front features four vertical doors, each equipped with a slim, black handle, and three drawers stacked vertically on the left side, also with matching handles. The cabinet's surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing additional items on top. The sides and back are plain, with no visible hardware or decorative elements, emphasizing its functional and understated appearance. The construction suggests a sturdy build, likely intended for storage in offices, garages, or urban residential spaces. The overall look is utilitarian yet stylish, blending seamlessly into contemporary urban environments.
description: A large, dark brown wooden cabinet with four doors and three drawers, featuring black handles and a smooth, modern finish. Its design is functional and minimal, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing four doors and three drawers with black handles, highlighting the main access points and storage features.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden panel with no visible hardware or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a broad, unadorned wooden surface, emphasizing the cabinet's solid back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden panel and a slight glimpse of the handles on the front.
